claims.claim: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry.
claims.supporting_snippet: An OpenAI model solved the 80-year-old unit distance problem, disproving a major conjecture in discrete geometry and marking a milestone in AI-driven mathematics.

claims.claim: OpenAI aims to build the best-equipped nonprofit the world has ever seen.
claims.supporting_snippet: Already a nonprofit, and already using AI to help people solve hard problems, OpenAI aims to build the best-equipped nonprofit the world has ever seen—combining potentially historic financial resources with something even more powerful: technology that can scale human ingenuity itself.

claims.claim: OpenAI has released new realtime voice models in the API that can reason, translate, and transcribe speech.
claims.supporting_snippet: Explore new realtime voice models in the OpenAI API that can reason, translate, and transcribe speech, enabling more natural and intelligent voice experiences.

claims.claim: Elon Musk's xAI has gone all in on natural gas, while SpaceX is obsessed with orbital data centers.
claims.supporting_snippet: Elon Muks's xAI has gone all in on natural gas, while SpaceX is obsessed with orbital data centers. What happened to the "solar-electric economy" he promised?

claims.claim: Blue Origin's New Glenn mega-rocket was cleared to fly after an April mishap.
claims.supporting_snippet: Blue Origin confirmed an engine failure led to the loss of an AST SpaceMobile satellite last month, but offered little detail.

claims.claim: Microsoft has introduced GridSFM, a small foundation model that can predict AC optimal power flow in milliseconds.
claims.supporting_snippet: Introducing GridSFM, a small foundation model that can predict AC optimal power flow in milliseconds, boosting efficiency and unlocking cost savings.

claims.claim: Microsoft's MatterSim is expanding AI capabilities for materials science, including faster large-scale simulations and a new multi-task model.
claims.supporting_snippet: MatterSim is expanding what AI can do for materials science—from faster large-scale simulations to MatterSim-MT, a new multi-task model for simulating properties beyond potential energy surfaces alone.

claims.claim: Microsoft introduced MagenticLite, an agentic system for small models that works across the browser and local file system.
claims.supporting_snippet: MagenticLite is an agentic system for small models that works across the browser and local file system in a single workflow.

claims.claim: Hugging Face hosts a model called Lance with 686 likes and 1227 downloads.
Hugging Face hosts a model called Tencent/Hy-MT2-1.8B with 364 likes and 2564 downloads.
Hugging Face hosts a model called Supertone/supertonic-3 with 604 likes and 40368 downloads.
Google DeepMind launched a new 27 billion parameter foundation model for single-cell analysis named Gemma.
claims.supporting_snippet: We’re launching a new 27 billion parameter foundation model for single-cell analysis built on the Gemma family of open models.

claims.claim: DeepMind launched T5Gemma, a new collection of encoder-decoder LLMs.
claims.supporting_snippet: Introducing T5Gemma, a new collection of encoder-decoder LLMs.

claims.claim: OpenReview hosts comments on repositories including CoLoR, Cognitive-Behaviors, RADA, Self-Instruct, and G-EVAL.
claims.supporting_snippet:
RepoName: CoLoR 

 RepoName: Cognitive-Behaviors 

 RepoName: RADA 

 RepoName: Self-Instruct 

 RepoName: G-EVAL

claims.claim: Anthropic is a public benefit corporation focused on AI research and products with safety at the frontier.
claims.supporting_snippet: Anthropic is a public benefit corporation dedicated to securing its benefits and mitigating its risks.

claims.claim: Google Research introduced Groundsource, which turns news reports into data using Gemini.
claims.supporting_snippet: Introducing Groundsource: Turning news reports into data with Gemini.
